title: poset_phase v5.0.0: Structural Cost Functional on Finite Causal Orders — Physica A Submission
description: Numerical framework for constrained structural selection on finite partially ordered sets (posets). v5.0.0 accompanies the Physica A submission 'Constrained structural selection on finite causal orders: historical loading, dimensional admissibility, and Lorentzian windows'. Key additions: (1) unified structural cost functional F7 with interval-richness admissibility wall; (2) anti-overfitting test battery (7 diagnostics: permutation, random-functional Monte Carlo, ablation, cross-validation, N-breakdown, new-seed generalization, fake-family discrimination); (3) spectral recovery experiments (W1 Wasserstein distance, spectral-entropy drift); (4) Pareto parameter search (915 viable points); (5) constrained Metropolis dynamics with microcanonical swap and simulated annealing (N=16-64). Previous versions: v4.0.0 (Prediction C quasi-causal), v2.0.0 (Prediction A 4D dominance), v2.1.0 (Prediction B bounded gamma_c).
notes: This software accompanies the manuscript: 'Constrained structural selection on finite causal orders: historical loading, dimensional admissibility, and Lorentzian windows' (submitted to Physica A: Statistical Mechanics and its Applications, 2026). AI tools (Claude, Anthropic) assisted with code development and analysis.
